title: Jewels
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Jewel}}
"'''Jewels'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by [[Annadale Fayde]] from her album ''[[Darkness on the Land]]''. It was given a [[Scarlet]] rating by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
